title: Full Frontal 4DP Test
description: The Sufferfest 4DP test: sprint + MAP + FTP + AC in one session

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/5. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 57 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 250% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:05 at 250%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 250% for 5s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 0:05 at 250%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 15% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 0:05 at 250%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/5. 250% FTP, Standing. 5s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 250% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 250% FTP, 95-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 22% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 120%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/5. Duration: 5:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/5. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/5. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 120% for 5:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 37% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 52% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 12 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 35 minutes in. 105% at 90-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 52% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 52% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 82% done. 0 intervals left. 11 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 82% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 82% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 1:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/5. 83% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 200% × 1:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 1:00 at 200%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 200% for 1:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 1:00. Alternating, 90-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 85% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 85% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
